title: astragalus sulfuratus
intro: Astragalus sulfuratus, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant in the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sulfuratus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue and stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus sulfuratus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
